en.question: In what ratio should tea costing Rs 240/kg be mixed with tea costing Rs 300/kg to get a mixture worth Rs 260/kg?

hi.question: ₹240/kg और ₹300/kg की चाय किस अनुपात में मिलाएँ कि ₹260/kg का मिश्रण मिले?

en.question: A container has milk and water in ratio 4:1. 10 liters water added, ratio becomes 2:1. Original milk quantity?

hi.question: दूध-पानी 4:1, 10L पानी मिलाने पर 2:1। मूल दूध की मात्रा?

en.question: 8 kg rice at Rs 40/kg mixed with 12 kg rice at Rs 50/kg. Cost per kg of mixture?
40 liters mixture, milk:water=3:2. How much water to add to make ratio 1:1?

hi.question: 40L मिश्रण, दूध:पानी=3:2। 1:1 करने हेतु कितना पानी?
